name: Chicken in Lemon Dill Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a medium non-stick frying pan.
2. Brown the chicken on both sides.
3. Stir in stock and wine. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes until the meat is no longer pink inside.
4. Remove the chicken and keep it hot.
5. Gradually add canned milk to corn starch until smooth.
6. Add the mixture to the liquid in the pan, stirring over medium heat until the sauce bubbles and thickens slightly.
7. Stir in lemon peel and dill.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Spoon the sauce over the chicken.
Prep time: 5 minutes
Cook time: 10 minutes
